title: calorhabdos arisanensis
intro: Calorhabdos arisanensis, also known as the Arisan calophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calorhabdos arisanensis include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and pain. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
